units.source_text: 2 ⾃我管理退休⾦計劃（「SAPS」）S3表，並根據性別，退休⾦數額及成員狀況採納不同列表及乘數因⼦，以反映計劃的實際死亡率經驗。死亡率改善乃根據連續
units.translation_target_text: 2 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous
units.translation_en: 2 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous

units.source_text: 死亡率調查局的CMI 2024年核⼼預測模型作出預測，改善率的初步增額為每年0.25%，⻑期改善率為每年1.25%，其他參數則根據模型預設數值⽽設定。
units.translation_target_text: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2024 core forecast model predicts that the initial increase in the improvement rate is 0.25% per year, and the mid-term improvement rate is 1.25% per year. Other parameters are set according to the model's preset values.
units.translation_en: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2024 core forecast model predicts that the initial increase in the improvement rate is 0.25% per year, and the mid-term improvement rate is 1.25% per year. Other parameters are set according to the model's preset values.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2024 core forecast model predicts that the initial increase in the improvement rate is 0.25% per year, and the mid-term improvement rate is 1.25% per year. Other parameters are set according to the model's preset values.

units.source_text: 3 ⾃我管理退休⾦計劃（「SAPS」）S3表，並根據性別，退休⾦數額及成員狀況採納不同列表及乘數因⼦，以反映計劃的實際死亡率經驗。死亡率改善乃根據連續
units.translation_target_text: 3 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous
units.translation_en: 3 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Self-Administered Pension Scheme ("SAPS") S3 table, and adopts different tables and multiplier factors according to gender, pension amount and member status to reflect the actual mortality experience of the scheme. Improvements in mortality are based on continuous

units.source_text: 死亡率調查局的CMI 2023年核⼼預測模型作出預測，改善率的初步增額為每年0.25%，⻑期改善率為每年1.25%，對2020及2021年死亡率經驗設定0%權重，以
units.translation_target_text: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2023 core forecast model predicts an initial increase in improvement rate of 0.25% per year, a mid-term improvement rate of 1.25% per year, and a 0% weighting for mortality experience in 2020 and 2021.
units.translation_en: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2023 core forecast model predicts an initial increase in improvement rate of 0.25% per year, a mid-term improvement rate of 1.25% per year, and a 0% weighting for mortality experience in 2020 and 2021.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The Bureau of Mortality Survey's CMI 2023 core forecast model predicts an initial increase in improvement rate of 0.25% per year, a mid-term improvement rate of 1.25% per year, and a 0% weighting for mortality experience in 2020 and 2021.

units.source_text: 及對2022及2023年死亡率經驗設定15%權重，以反映疫情過後死亡率改善的⻑期觀點。
units.translation_target_text: And a 15% weight is set for the mortality experience in 2022 and 2023 to reflect the long-term view of mortality improvement after the epidemic.
units.translation_en: And a 15% weight is set for the mortality experience in 2022 and 2023 to reflect the long-term view of mortality improvement after the epidemic.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: And a 15% weight is set for the mortality experience in 2022 and 2023 to reflect the long-term view of mortality improvement after the epidemic.

units.source_text: 以上敏感度分析乃基於⼀項假設變動⽽所有其他假設保持不變。實際上這不⼤可能發⽣，⽽某些假設的變動可能互有關連。當計算界定福利責任對
units.translation_target_text: The above sensitivity analysis is based on a change in one assumption while all other assumptions remain unchanged. In practice this is unlikely to happen, and changes in certain assumptions may be related to each other. When calculating defined benefit obligations for
units.translation_en: The above sensitivity analysis is based on a change in one assumption while all other assumptions remain unchanged. In practice this is unlikely to happen, and changes in certain assumptions may be related to each other. When calculating defined benefit obligations for

units.source_text: 重⼤精算假設的敏感度時，乃應⽤計算於資產負債表確認界定福利資產的相同⽅法（於報告期末以預計單位信貸成本法計算界定福利責任的現
units.translation_target_text: When determining the sensitivity of significant actuarial assumptions, the same method used to calculate defined benefit assets recognized on the balance sheet is applied (the estimated unit credit cost method is used to calculate the current cost of defined benefit obligations at the end of the reporting period).
units.translation_en: When determining the sensitivity of significant actuarial assumptions, the same method used to calculate defined benefit assets recognized on the balance sheet is applied (the estimated unit credit cost method is used to calculate the current cost of defined benefit obligations at the end of the reporting period).

units.source_text: 值）。該等⽅法及於編製敏感度分析時使⽤的假設類別與過往期間並無分別。

units.source_text: 1 2025年應付PwC之審計費⽤包括於最終確定2024年財務報表後對上年度審計費⽤作出之調整。此外，2025年PwC亦獲210萬美元費⽤報銷。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The audit fees payable to PwC in 2025 include adjustments to the previous year's audit fees after the 2024 financial statements are finalized. In addition, PwC also received US$2.1 million in expense reimbursement in 2025.

units.source_text: 2 就PwC對滙豐之綜合財務報表及滙豐控股之獨立財務報表進⾏法定審計⽽應付的費⽤。有關費⽤包括就滙豐控股附屬公司之綜合申報表提供相關服務⽽應付的款
units.translation_target_text: 2 Fees payable by PwC in connection with the statutory audit of HSBC's consolidated financial statements and HSBC Holdings' separate financial statements. The fees include amounts payable in connection with the provision of services related to the consolidated returns of HSBC Holdings subsidiaries.
units.translation_en: 2 Fees payable by PwC in connection with the statutory audit of HSBC's consolidated financial statements and HSBC Holdings' separate financial statements. units.source_text: 額，該等申報表乃經明確識別對集團的審計意⾒可提供⽀持憑證。

units.source_text: 3 包括鑑證服務及與法定和監管規定申報有關的其他服務（包括中期審閱）。

units.source_text: 4 包括主要為第三⽅最終⽤⼾編製及由第三⽅最終⽤⼾使⽤的服務機構內部監控措施認證報告相關的獲許可服務（包括信⼼保證書）。
units.translation_target_text: 4 Includes licensed services (including confidence assurance) related to certification reports on the internal controls of a service organization primarily prepared for and used by third-party end-users.

units.source_text: 滙豐無須就以下各類服務向擔任主要核數師的PwC⽀付費⽤：內部審計服務，以及與訴訟、招聘及薪酬相關之服務。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC is not required to pay PwC, as the lead auditor, for internal audit services and services related to litigation, recruitment and payroll.

units.source_text: 滙豐之相關退休⾦計劃無須就以下各類服務向擔任主要核數師的PwC⽀付費⽤：內部審計服務、其他鑑證服務、與企業融資交易相關之服務、估值
